ddls:
CREATE TABLE "countries" (
  "country_code" TEXT /* Unique country code (e.g., AFG, AGO) */,
  "country_name" TEXT /* Full name of the country */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region or continent to which the country belongs */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the country */,
  "area" REAL /* Area of the country */,
  "capital" TEXT /* Capital city of the country */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("country_code")
)

CREATE TABLE "energy_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data point */,
  "country_code" TEXT /* Country code */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of energy data */,
  "energy_consumption" INTEGER /* Energy consumption value */,
  "energy_type_id" INTEGER /* Type of energy data (e.g., production, consumption) */,
  "energy_unit_id" INTEGER /* Unit of energy data (e.g., kilowatt-hours, megawatt-hours) */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data source */,
  "sector" TEXT /* Sector of energy data (e.g., residential, industrial, transportation) */,
  "renewable" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the energy is renewable */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_energy_data_energy_unit_id FOREIGN KEY ("energy_unit_id") REFERENCES energy_units ("unit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_energy_data_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_energy_data_energy_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("energy_type_id") REFERENCES energy_types ("type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_energy_data_year FOREIGN KEY ("year") REFERENCES years ("year"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_energy_data_country_code FOREIGN KEY ("country_code") REFERENCES countries ("country_code")
)

CREATE TABLE "years" (
  "year_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each year */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year value */,
  "quarter" TEXT /* Quarter of the year (e.g., Q1, Q2, Q3, Q4) */,
  "month" TEXT /* Month of the year (e.g., January, February) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("year_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "energy_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each energy type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the energy type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the energy type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "energy_units" (
  "unit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each energy unit */,
  "unit_name" TEXT /* Name of the energy unit */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the energy unit */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("unit_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the data source */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the data source */,
  "url" TEXT /* URL of the data source */,
  "contact" TEXT /* Contact information of the data source */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "energy_forecasts" (
  "forecast_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each forecast */,
  "country_code" TEXT /* Country code */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of forecast */,
  "energy_forecast" INTEGER /* Energy forecast value */,
  "energy_type_id" INTEGER /* Type of energy forecast (e.g., production, consumption) */,
  "energy_unit_id" INTEGER /* Unit of energy forecast (e.g., kilowatt-hours, megawatt-hours) */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data source */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("forecast_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_energy_forecasts_energy_unit_id FOREIGN KEY ("energy_unit_id") REFERENCES energy_units ("unit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_energy_forecasts_country_code FOREIGN KEY ("country_code") REFERENCES countries ("country_code"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_energy_forecasts_year FOREIGN KEY ("year") REFERENCES years ("year"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_energy_forecasts_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_energy_forecasts_energy_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("energy_type_id") REFERENCES energy_types ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "researchers" (
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each researcher */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the researcher */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the researcher */,
  "institution" TEXT /* Institution affiliated with the researcher */,
  "affiliation" TEXT /* Affiliation of the researcher */,
  "research_interests" TEXT /* Research interests of the researcher */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("researcher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "publications" (
  "publication_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each publication */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the publication */,
  "authors" TEXT /* List of authors */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of publication */,
  "journal" TEXT /* Name of the journal where the publication was published */,
  "doi" TEXT /* DOI (Digital Object Identifier) of the publication */,
  "abstract" TEXT /* Abstract of the publication */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("publication_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role (e.g., researcher, administrator) */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "institution" TEXT /* Institution affiliated with the user */,
  "profile_picture" TEXT /* URL of the user's profile picture */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_requests" (
  "request_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data request */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* User ID */,
  "data_description" TEXT /* Description of the requested data */,
  "request_date" TEXT /* Date the request was made */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the data request (e.g., pending, approved, rejected) */,
  "reason" TEXT /* Reason for the status (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("request_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_requests_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_downloads" (
  "download_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data download */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* User ID */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Data ID */,
  "download_date" TEXT /* Date the data was downloaded */,
  "file_name" TEXT /* Name of the downloaded file */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the downloaded file */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("download_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_downloads_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES energy_data ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_downloads_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Data ID */,
  "reviewer_id" INTEGER /* Reviewer ID */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date the review was made */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating (e.g., 1-5) */,
  "comment" TEXT /* Comment along with the rating */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_reviews_reviewer_id FOREIGN KEY ("reviewer_id") REFERENCES researchers ("researcher_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_reviews_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES energy_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Data ID */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* User ID */,
  "comment_date" TEXT /* Date the comment was made */,
  "comment" TEXT /* Comment text */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating along with the comment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_comments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_comments_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES energy_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_ratings" (
  "rating_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rating */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Data ID */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* User ID */,
  "rating_date" TEXT /* Date the rating was made */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating (e.g., 1-5) */,
  "comment" TEXT /* Comment along with the rating */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rating_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_ratings_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES energy_data ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_ratings_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_tags" (
  "tag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tag */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Data ID */,
  "tag_name" TEXT /* Tag name */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the tag */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tag_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_tags_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES energy_data ("data_id")
)
